articles.title_en: In Pyatigorsk, a fire was extinguished after an explosion at a gas station
articles.lead_en: This was reported by the press service of the Ministry of Emergency Situations of the Russian Federation.
articles.title_raw: В Пятигорске ликвидировали пожар после взрыва на АЗС
articles.lead_raw: Об этом сообщили в пресс-службе МЧС РФ

articles.title_en: Four Russian civilians killed during Victory Day ceasefire — diplomat
articles.lead_en: According to Rodion Miroshnik, 47 civilians were injured in the period
articles.title_raw: Four Russian civilians killed during Victory Day ceasefire — diplomat
articles.lead_raw: According to Rodion Miroshnik, 47 civilians were injured in the period
